title: cyclosorus articulatus
intro: Cyclosorus articulatus, also known as the articulated fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus articulatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be applied topically to the skin in the form of poultices or ointments.
